title: Stage 3 diagnostics: migrate to four-level model
description: Introduce diagnostics plus derived errors/warnings/suggestions/infos with {level, code, message, ref, target}; cover spec registry and preserve render behavior.
triage_notes: Stage 3 diagnostics DONE. Native diagnostic() helper is used across validate/parser/render paths; diagnostics sync to canonical diagnostics plus derived errors/warnings/suggestions/infos; registry coverage includes vocab, auth, boundary, data, telemetry, unknown_base_view, unknown_overlay, and view_3d_unavailable registration. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test (76), npm run build, aof organization-verify 22/22. View overlay projection composition is now TASK-002 scope.
